It includes route, confirmation, cost, passengers count; does not include flight times, but format only asks for flight details with costs; provided sufficient → OK. - accommodation: hotel name, booking reference, nights, cost → OK. - activities: selected activities with dates and costs; one pass valid all 5 days cost included → OK. - additional_services: extra services with costs required; they listed emergency contact registration and email confirmations, but no costs provided; format requires any extra services with costs → Not fully specified. - total_budget: complete cost breakdown; they gave total and delta under budget, but not a breakdown per item beyond earlier mentions; however the total_budget field itself states €1,475 total cost; “complete cost breakdown” implies itemized; the package includes costs for transportation (€400), accommodation (€875), activities (€70+€80+€120=€270), summing to €1,545, which contradicts stated €1,475; also not fully itemized in total_budget field and inconsistent → Not fully specified.

Activities listed: Golf Day Package for Carlos maps to 'Golf Day'; City Walking Tour for family maps to 'City Walking Tour'; Museum Day Pass maps to 'Museum Day Pass'.
